brief.purpose: Local-first AI short-drama production studio for story development, vertical-shot review, video generation, role voice, captions, rendering, and publishing
brief.concept: A luminous portrait-format cinematic frame formed by two confident editing cuts, suggesting a continuous production timeline and controlled transformation from shot to finished film; no letters, no text, no generic camera or play-button icon
brief.style: Restrained, professional, cinematic, geometric, production-tool precision, bold silhouette, minimal details, recognizable at 16 pixels
brief.palette: charcoal black, warm coral #E9684B, warm ivory #E9E7E2

prompts.dock: App: LumaWorks. Purpose: Local-first AI short-drama production studio for story development, vertical-shot review, video generation, role voice, captions, rendering, and publishing. Core symbol: A luminous portrait-format cinematic frame formed by two confident editing cuts, suggesting a continuous production timeline and controlled transformation from shot to finished film; no letters, no text, no generic camera or play-button icon. Visual style: Restrained, professional, cinematic, geometric, production-tool precision, bold silhouette, minimal details, recognizable at 16 pixels. Palette: charcoal black, warm coral #E9684B, warm ivory #E9E7E2. Create a distinctive, original product icon with simple geometry, excellent silhouette, clear hierarchy, no letters, no words, no watermark, no device mockup, and no UI screenshot. Continue the selected visual direction: Bold geometric silhouette with memorable negative space and the fewest possible shapes. Render a polished macOS Dock app icon: a refined rounded-square object with restrained depth and material detail. Keep the icon and any soft shadow within the central 88 percent of a square canvas. The area outside the icon is chroma. The entire background, including every edge and corner, must be one perfectly uniform flat chroma color #FF00FF. Do not use that chroma color inside the icon.
prompts.menu: App: LumaWorks. Purpose: Local-first AI short-drama production studio for story development, vertical-shot review, video generation, role voice, captions, rendering, and publishing. Core symbol: A luminous portrait-format cinematic frame formed by two confident editing cuts, suggesting a continuous production timeline and controlled transformation from shot to finished film; no letters, no text, no generic camera or play-button icon. Visual style: Restrained, professional, cinematic, geometric, production-tool precision, bold silhouette, minimal details, recognizable at 16 pixels. Palette: charcoal black, warm coral #E9684B, warm ivory #E9E7E2. Create a distinctive, original product icon with simple geometry, excellent silhouette, clear hierarchy, no letters, no words, no watermark, no device mockup, and no UI screenshot. Continue the selected visual direction: Bold geometric silhouette with memorable negative space and the fewest possible shapes. Render a minimal one-color black linear symbol for a macOS menu bar. Use consistent medium-weight strokes, no gradients, no shading, no enclosing tile, no filled background, and very few details. Keep the line symbol within the central 76 percent of a square canvas. The entire background, including every edge and corner, must be one perfectly uniform flat chroma color #FF00FF. Do not use that chroma color inside the icon.

selection.direction: Bold geometric silhouette with memorable negative space and the fewest possible shapes.
